author: doll-agent
content: README commit landed: 29ecbcdb. 10 files changed, 209 insertions, 79 deletions across main README + ferray-{linalg,ufunc,stats,ma,numpy-interop,random,polynomial,io,strings} READMEs. All 0.2.x perf claims (23/55) replaced with 0.3.0 numbers (40/55), GEMM kernel suite + Cargo Features table added to main README, complex transcendentals + libm trig dispatch policy documented in ferray-ufunc, full crate surfaces refreshed for ma/numpy-interop/polynomial/random/io/strings reflecting the major 0.2.x additions that were missing from their READMEs.
